source_observations.local_summary: Fiverr public navigation exposes AI Websites & Software, AI Mobile Apps, AI Agents, Data Model Training, AI Technology Consulting, Generative Engine Optimization, AI Integrations, Automations & Agents, APIs & Integrations, AI Consulting, and AI-powered marketing categories.
source_observations.route_effect: Bundle shape should be practical AI consulting / agent workflow / automation design, not an unsupported revenue or fully autonomous implementation promise.

source_observations.local_summary: Local kit provides SKILL.md template, gate checklist, artifact contract, service-request checklist, acceptance review, buyer guide, and fictional example.
source_observations.route_effect: Can support a Fiverr-style service for packaging one agent workflow into a reusable local skill packet.

source_observations.local_summary: Local offer matrix maps current AI-agent, AI-product, agent architecture, assistant safety, and workflow-integration demand into no-contact services.
source_observations.route_effect: Can be repackaged as service bundles while preserving no-account/no-proposal/no-public-action gates.

source_observations.local_summary: Existing build brief defines an AI builder launch checklist pack with positioning, launch checklist, screenshot shotlist, QA pass, and post-launch review templates.
source_observations.route_effect: Can support a launch-readiness bundle for AI builders without creating a marketplace listing.

bundles.service_name_local: Package one AI-agent workflow into a reusable skill packet
bundles.buyer: AI builders or operators with a repeatable workflow they want to make safer and reusable.
scope: Map one workflow from plain-language notes or local sample material.
Add allowed/forbidden actions, stop gates, artifact contract, and acceptance checks.
bundles.turnaround_hypothesis: 2-4 business days after receiving non-sensitive workflow notes.
not_in_scope: No credentials, APIs, client private data, or public posting.
No revenue, compliance, or platform-approval guarantee.

bundles.service_name_local: Audit one business workflow for safe AI automation opportunities
bundles.buyer: Small teams with repetitive reporting, support, content, or operations workflows.
scope: Identify automation candidates and human review points.
Use synthetic/sample data only unless a later contract/data approval exists.
bundles.turnaround_hypothesis: 3-5 business days for one documented workflow.
not_in_scope: No access to Gmail, Slack, CRM, ad accounts, or private systems.
No guaranteed time savings or revenue lift.
No contract/payment/public marketplace action from this packet.

bundles.service_name_local: Prepare an AI-builder launch readiness pack
bundles.buyer: Solo AI builders preparing a small product, template, or service launch.
scope: Draft a positioning template for one offer.
Create a launch checklist and screenshot shotlist.
Create a QA pass checklist and post-launch review template.
Keep all assets local until marketplace/public approval exists.
bundles.turnaround_hypothesis: 2-3 business days after receiving product notes and local screenshots or descriptions.
not_in_scope: No Fiverr gig or marketplace listing creation.
No live demand validation unless separately approved.
No seller terms, payout, tax, KYC, or account setup.
No guaranteed sales, rankings, conversion, or launch outcome.

why_first: It reuses the strongest existing digital product asset, has clear local deliverables, and avoids live integrations, client credentials, or production system access.
acceptance_checks: Three service bundles have scope, deliverables, turnaround hypotheses, and stop gates.
Each bundle maps to current public Fiverr AI category signals.
Each bundle maps to existing local evidence assets.
No Fiverr account, gig, seller profile, listing, upload, message, payment, or public action occurs.
No guaranteed revenue, ranking, conversion, compliance, or platform approval claim is made.
next_action: Create a no-publish Fiverr approval request packet for the recommended first bundle only after human review; keep Fiverr account, gig/listing, seller terms, payout, client data, credentials, public action, worker/runtime, model/MCP, and external side effects blocked.
